2606.29748.title: Rethinking Generative Reconstruction Attacks against Graph Neural Network Models
2606.29748.paper_summary: The application of graph data in numerous disciplines raises the need for gathering and analyzing huge volumes of data, some of which is private and sensitive. The non-Euclidean nature of the graph data makes the analysis computationally challenging, leading to the use of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) in the age of AI. GNNs may inadvertently leak sensitive data they are trained on, which raises serious data security issues, including the model inversion attack. In this study, we analyze GNNs' vulnerabilities by introducing two novel graph inversion (i.e., reconstruction) attacks: graph-label conditioned (GLC) attack and embedding-label conditioned (ELC) attack, utilizing targetmodel predictions and their intermediate representations, respectively. We perform a comprehensive analysis of our introduced privacy attacks and compare them with existing baselines across three benchmark graph datasets (i.e., NCI1, PROTEINS, and AIDS) and four graph distributional/structural metrics (i.e., FGD, EGD, MMD, and GKS). Our work demonstrates that an adversary can use the generator-discriminator technique to reconstruct high-quality graphs in real-world black-box attack scenarios against GNNs. Additionally, we present a variant of our attacks (Ours--) with 50% reduced queries, achieving good or comparable reconstruction attack performance. In addition, we show that GNNs are highly vulnerable to privacy attacks, varying Laplacian noise-scales.
2606.29748.paper_summary_zh: 圖形數據在許多學科中的應用提高了收集和分析大量數據的需求，其中一些數據是私密和敏感的。圖形數據的非歐幾里得特性使得分析在計算上具有挑戰性，促使在人工智慧時代使用圖神經網絡（GNNs）。GNNs 可能無意中洩露它們所訓練的敏感數據，這引發了嚴重的數據安全問題，包括模型反演攻擊。在這項研究中，我們通過引入兩種新穎的圖形反演（即重建）攻擊來分析 GNNs 的脆弱性：圖標籤條件（GLC）攻擊和嵌入標籤條件（ELC）攻擊，分別利用目標模型的預測和其中間表示。我們對我們引入的隱私攻擊進行了全面分析，並將其與三個基準圖形數據集（即 NCI1、PROTEINS 和 AIDS）及四個圖形分佈/結構指標（即 FGD、EGD、MMD 和 GKS）上的現有基準進行比較。我們的工作表明，對手可以使用生成器-判別器技術在針對 GNNs 的現實世界黑箱攻擊場景中重建高質量的圖形。此外，我們提出了一種我們攻擊的變體（Ours--），其查詢數量減少了 50%，達到了良好或可比的重建攻擊性能。此外，我們顯示 GNNs 對隱私攻擊高度脆弱，拉普拉斯噪聲尺度變化。
2606.29748.author: Adebayo Keji et.al.
